ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instrument */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Camera, Limb Sounder, CIMS, Fluorescence) */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research center where the instrument is located */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the instrument */,
  "calibration_interval" TEXT /* Frequency of calibration (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument for unique identification */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was installed */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was decommissioned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instrument (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES research_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the research center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the research center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the center */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the research center was established */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the center's director */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the center's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research center where the aircraft is based */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft for unique identification */,
  "service_life" INTEGER /* Expected service life of the aircraft */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was decommissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES research_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_aircraft" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was installed on the aircraft */,
  "deinstallation_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was removed from the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_aircraft_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_aircraft_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument that recorded the measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of the measurement (e.g., Integrated vertical column, Vertical profile, In situ) */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the aircraft when the measurement was taken */,
  "research_project" TEXT /* Name of the research project associated with the measurement */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator for the measurement */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_instruments" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument calibration at the time of measurement (e.g., calibrated, not calibrated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_instruments_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement detail */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the measurement */,
  "swath_width" REAL /* Swath width of the measurement */,
  "horizontal_resolution" REAL /* Horizontal resolution of the measurement */,
  "vertical_resolution" TEXT /* Vertical resolution of the measurement */,
  "wavelengths" TEXT /* Wavelengths of the measurement */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the measurement data (e.g., CSV, JSON, NetCDF) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement data (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0 for good, 1 for questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_details_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research center the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile photo */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES research_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the measurement */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the dataset belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, NetCDF) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the dataset to facilitate search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., text, PDF) */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the readme file to facilitate search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
